title: dicranolepis buchholzii
intro: Dicranolepis buchholzii, a plant species native to West Africa, belongs to the family Rubiaceae and is commonly known as Buchholz's dicranolepis. Traditionally, the plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Dicranolepis buchholzii are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat various skin conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and decoctions, are used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
